name: Harem Girls Have it Easy
description:
Do you want to live in a big mansion, surrounded by beautiful women, and have sex all day?

Lucky you, you've been transformed into a harem girl. Now you'll get to experience all of that and more!

After staring at a strategically placed magic mirror for too long, you're transformed into a lovely, sun-kissed beauty who gets to join the great Sultan Aziz's harem!

Join the teasing giantess Layla and the grumpy shortstack Danya in what are sure to be pleasurable nights with your new master~

This is the first bot of the "Dune June" series I'll be doing for the next month. Look forward to more sand-related tg scenarios in the upcoming weeks.

Other Bots of the series:

Not What You Wished For (Genie TF)

Dummy Mummy GF (Mummy TF)

Riddle Me Tits (Sphinx TF)
creator: Frinky
